name: Petrobras Distribuidora S.A.
summary: Petrobras Distribuidora S.A. manufactures, processes, distributes, trades, transports, imports, and exports oil products and other fuels in Brazil. It offers lubricants, compressed natural gas, biofuels, chemical products, sulfur, hydrocarbon solvents, asphalt, ethanol, Arla 32, convenience store products, and related services. The company also provides jet fuels, marine diesel oil, aviation gasoline, and aviation services; distributes green petroleum coke; undertakes projects for selling electricity; and operates a piped gas supply concession, as well as offers administrative and technical services. In addition, it engages in franchisees business; and power generation activities. The company serves aviation, retail, consumer, oil and gas, fine chemicals, agribusiness, coatings, adhesives, home care products, and rubber industries. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
